# Sprint 8.2 Financial Attribution

**Project:** Customer Churn Prediction and Retention System
**Sprint:** Sprint 8. Measurement
**Objective:** Develop a measurement and experimentation framework to evaluate the effectiveness of the retention strategy and identify areas for improvement.

## Description
Develop a framework for financial attribution to measure the incremental revenue impact of the retention strategy.

## Deliverable
Financial attribution framework
